title: Getting System Info with os Module
description: Retrieve operating system details like CPU, memory, and platform.

slides.title: The os Module 🖥️
slides.content:
# Operating System Information

The `os` module provides methods to interact with the operating system.

```javascript
const os = require('os');
```

Commonly used methods:

- `os.platform()` – returns OS platform (e.g., 'darwin', 'win32', 'linux')
- `os.arch()` – CPU architecture (e.g., 'x64')
- `os.cpus()` – array of CPU/core info
- `os.totalmem()` / `os.freemem()` – total and free memory in bytes
- `os.homedir()` – user's home directory
- `os.hostname()` – system hostname
- `os.uptime()` – system uptime in seconds

slides.title: os Info in Action
slides.content: Run this to see your system details:
